rows.finalText: For "What is the next right step in my calling", the spread keeps returning to purpose / calling themes with a right path emphasis. Sun (31) in Past sets the tone with energy and confidence support forward movement. Here, Sun emphasizes confidence, visibility, success, and the warming effect of momentum that is finally obvious. Sun (31) with Book (26) keep emphasizing a blend of success and knowledge, asking you to use visibility responsibly while staying alert to withholding critical context.
